S.n: Vela v13 Showcases All 29 Block Types

B.x: Every block type, one deck — interactive, visual, and structured content in action.
Typography guides the reader's eye through a logical flow. Every element earns its place on the canvas — nothing decorative, everything intentional.
Clarity is not the absence of complexity, but the mastery of it. The best interfaces disappear.

B.x: From Zero to Production API in 4 Steps

I.title: Create Account
I.x: Sign up at console.anthropic.com and verify your email address

I.title: Generate API Key
I.x: Navigate to API Keys, click Create Key, and copy the secret

I.title: Install the SDK
I.x: Run: npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk  or  pip install anthropic

I.title: Send First Message
I.x: Execute the quickstart snippet and inspect your first model response

I: Model Comparison Guide — speed, cost, and capability breakdown

S.n: Tags and Callouts Surface What Matters Most

B.title: Rate Limits Tripled in Q1 2025
B.x: All tiers now receive 3× higher rate limits. Upgrade to Tier 2 for 1 million tokens per minute sustained throughput.

B.title: Unlock 90% Cost Savings with Prompt Caching
B.x: Cache system prompt prefixes up to 1M tokens. Repeated calls pay only 10% of input token cost. Enable via cache_control in your API request.

S.n: Checklists Turn Intent Into Accountable Action

I.x: API key stored in environment variable, never hardcoded
Retry logic with exponential backoff and jitter
Token usage logging enabled for cost tracking
System prompt reviewed for prompt injection risks
Rate limit handling tested under realistic load
Fallback model configured for overload scenarios

B.x: Complete all items before promoting to production. Track status in your team's deployment runbook.

S.n: Prompts Reveal Three Levels of Engineering Maturity

B.x: Three Prompt Patterns Every Engineer Knows

You are a senior software architect. Review the following code for security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and maintainability issues. For each finding provide: (1) severity, (2) explanation, (3) a corrected code snippet. Be concise and actionable. Prioritize critical findings first.

You are a {{role}} with deep expertise in {{domain}}. Write a {{format}} that helps {{audience}} understand {{topic}}. Use {{tone}} language and include {{number}} concrete examples drawn from {{industry}}.
Empty — blank canvas, ready to author:

S.n: Challenges Build Durable Skills Through Practice

B.x: Hands-On Exercises for Every Experience Level

B.title: Write Your First Effective Prompt
B.desc: Craft a prompt that asks Claude to explain a technical concept to a non-technical audience. Run it, evaluate the output quality, then refine it at least twice and document what changed.

B.title: Build a RAG Question-Answering Pipeline
B.desc: Implement a document Q&A system: chunk a PDF, embed with voyage-3, store in a vector database, and retrieve relevant context for Claude to answer questions accurately with citations.

B.title: Orchestrate a Multi-Agent Workflow
B.desc: Build an orchestrator that delegates to specialized sub-agents — a researcher, a coder, and a critic. Each agent uses tools. The orchestrator aggregates results and resolves factual conflicts.
